basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) has released the official Institute Research Fellow Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a B.Tech/ B.E., M.Tech, or M.Sc. in Computer Science, AI/ ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neurochemistry, or Neuroscience are eligible to apply via email until 25-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/ B.E/ M.Tech/ M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neurochemistry, Neuroscience
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech/M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neurochemistry, Neuroscience. Candidates with Experience or strong interest in Machine Learning, Virtual Reality/Unity, serious games, or human-computer interaction will be given opportunity.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BITS Pilani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Institute Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Institute Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E/M.Tech/M.Sc degree in fields like Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neurochemistry, or Neuroscience.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and relevant documents to the official email address provided by BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Institute Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Does BITS Pilani offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxation details. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Institute Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for BITS Pilani, Goa Campus, located in Goa, with the pincode 403726.

faq.question: Q10. What additional experience or interest is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates with prior experience or a strong interest in Machine Learning, Virtual Reality/Unity, serious games, or human-computer interaction will be given preference.
